title: LLM Research Pipeline
description: A 4-stage LLM research pipeline — idea generation to portfolio proposal — built on a persistent, web-search-grounded knowledge base with STALE/COMPRESS/KEEP triage, async recursive ticker deep-dives, and an adversarial counter-proposer that challenges every proposal before positions reach the order engine.

title: Automated Trading System
description: A live trading system written in Rust, interfacing directly with Interactive Brokers IB Gateway to run multiple concurrent strategies — complete with a custom proc-macro CRUD layer, a unified Order Management System with multi-currency FX chains, and a Tauri desktop/mobile dashboard.

title: Orbital (CP2106)
description: A full-stack timetable planner that lets NUS students generate constraint-satisfying class schedules across friend groups — powered by z3-solver on the backend, built from scratch in Y1 summer without component libraries or LLM help.
